name: rule options: overrides:[{files, rules}] options merge with the base rule options (override values win, base defaults preserved)
command:
mkdir -p src/payments tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: G
  authoritative_url: https://g.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules:
  - {id: g-x-001, name: x, description: x, detector: x, type: problem, fixable: null, has_suggestions: false, deprecated: false, replaced_by: [], docs_url: https://x.com, requires_type_checking: false, recommended: true, options_schema: {type: object, properties: {max: {type: integer, default: 10}, strict: {type: boolean, default: false}}}, messages: {default: x}, severity: P1, version: 1.0.0, semver: 1.0.0, rule_state: warn-only, provenance: [{source: x, class: published-standard, section_id: x, url: https://x.com, fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z, content_hash: sha256:S}]}
recommended_set: [g-x-001]
all_set: [g-x-001]
' > tree/google/x.yaml && printf 'rules:
  g-x-001: ["error", {max: 5}]
overrides:
  - files: ["src/payments/**"]
    rules:
      g-x-001: ["error", {strict: true}]
' > profile.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/resolve.sh" profile.yaml --tree "$PWD/tree" --for-file src/payments/a.js --emit-resolved 2>out.json && grep -E '"max":5.*"strict":true' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
